_comment: App-local strings not yet in Transifex. Each entry here is a key the UI uses today that does not exist in the upstream Transifex project for Invoice Ninja. When a key is submitted to Transifex and arrives in the next import, delete it from this file. Lookup order in lib/l10n/localization.dart is: active locale -> Transifex en.json -> this file -> raw key, so Transifex wins as soon as it carries the key.
company_settings_only: Configured at the company level only.
payment_links_empty_help: Payment links let customers self-serve subscriptions and one-time purchases.
restore_confirm_message: This will overwrite the current company's data. Continue?
purge_data_scope: All clients, invoices, quotes, payments, products, expenses, projects and tasks will be permanently deleted. Settings are preserved.
only_owners_can_access: Only the account owner can use this page.
already_deleted_remote: The company was already removed on the server. Please refresh and try again.
server_didnt_respond: Server didn't respond. Please try again.
file_no_longer_available: Selected file is no longer available.
import_data_help: All your records (clients, invoices, payments, and more).
backup_sent_to_email: We'll email a download link to
verifactu_locks_invoices: Invoice locking is enforced by the VeriFactu integration.
verifactu_description: VeriFactu is the mandatory Spanish e-invoicing standard. Before sending invoices you must register with the Spanish Tax Agency (AEAT) and authorize Invoice Ninja as your e-invoicing provider.
switch_away_from_peppol_message: This account is still bound to the PEPPOL network. Switching the e-invoice type away will leave the binding active on the server. Disconnect from PEPPOL first, then change the type.
task_invoiced_locked: This task has been invoiced — fields are read-only.
no_task_statuses_hint: Create statuses under Settings → Task Statuses to build a kanban board.
add_company_confirm: A new company will be created on your account. You can rename and configure it after.
not_owner_add_company: Only the account owner can add companies
create_your_first_project_placeholder: Create your first project to group tasks, track budgets, and invoice work to a client.
no_tasks_for_project: No tasks for this project yet
create_your_first_client_placeholder: Create your first client in M1.10b — coming soon.
client_not_found_subtitle: It may have been deleted or you may not have access.
discard_changes_warning: Your edits will be lost if you leave now.
name_filter_hint: Type any part of a name (contains)
email_filter_hint: Type any part of an email (contains)
balance_filter_hint: Type a balance — clients with more than this amount
created_filter_hint: Type a date (yyyy-mm-dd) — clients created after
updated_filter_hint: Type a date (yyyy-mm-dd) — clients updated after
password_reset_link_sent: Check your email for a reset link.
update_required_body: Your Invoice Ninja client is at v:current. This server requires at least v:min. Please update from the App Store and try again.
unsynced_changes_body_singular: You have :count unsynced change on this workspace. Sync them before switching, discard them, or cancel.
unsynced_changes_body_plural: You have :count unsynced changes on this workspace. Sync them before switching, discard them, or cancel.
confirm_delete_view: Delete this saved view? This can't be undone.
no_saved_views_for_entity: No saved views for this list yet.
sign_out_warning: Your locally cached data will be cleared. Any unsynced edits should be synced first.
user_details_coming_soon_subtitle: User profile editing lands when the user entity is wired up. Sign-out is parked here for now.
enable_biometric_description: Use Face ID or Touch ID to unlock the app instead of typing your password.
force_resync_description: Re-download all clients from the server. Use this if the local cache feels out of date.
mixed_currencies_hint: Mixed currencies — pick one to see totals.
pick_currency_for_chart: Pick a currency to view the chart.
details_in_next_update: Details arrive in the next update.
avg_days_to_pay_no_data: Average days to pay, not enough data
select_a_setting: Select a setting from the list
coming_soon_subtitle: Will land in a later milestone.
please_type_password: Please type your password to confirm.
two_factor_about_body: Add an extra layer of security at sign-in. After enabling, you'll be prompted for a 6-digit code from your authenticator app each time you log in.
scan_qr_code_with_app: Scan this QR code with Google Authenticator (or any compatible TOTP app), then enter the 6-digit code to confirm.
enter_sms_code: Enter the SMS code we just sent you.
disable_two_factor_warning: Your account will no longer require a one-time code at sign-in.
offline_changes_will_sync: Changes are saved locally and will sync when you're back online.
sync_queue_empty_subtitle: Saved changes appear here while they wait to sync.
save_rejected_banner: The server rejected this save. Fix the errors below and try again.
no_groups_yet_subtitle: Groups let you override company settings (currency, language, country) for a set of clients.
connect_oauth_coming_soon: Sign in with Google or Microsoft will be enabled in a follow-up update.
documents_drop_hint: Drop files here or click Upload
no_custom_labels: No custom labels yet. Pick one from the dropdown above or add your own.
create_your_first_company_gateway_placeh: Connect a payment gateway so your clients can pay invoices online.
no_payment_types_enabled: No payment types enabled. Toggle one on in the Settings tab.
behavior_always_show_required_fields: Always show the required fields prompt on the checkout page, even when all values are already on file.
behavior_update_details: Save the address the client enters at checkout back to their profile.
oauth_gateway_stub_body: Setting up :name requires a few external redirects. Complete the setup in the web admin; the gateway will appear here once connected, and you can manage its fees and required fields below.
gateway_order_inherits_from_company: Showing inherited order from company. Drag rows to override.
gateway_order_inherits_from_group_named: Showing inherited order from group :name. Drag rows to override.
gateway_order_what_is_this: The order gateways appear in this scope's client-portal checkout. Drag rows to reorder. Reset to fall back to the inherited order.
reset_gateway_order_confirm: Remove this scope's gateway order? Clients will see the inherited order.
no_gateways_for_reorder_subtitle: No gateways configured. Add one at company scope to set a portal order.
wrote_stale_rows: Wrote :count stale row(s) to the diagnostics log
set_due_date_and_budget: Set a due date and budget to see pace
set_due_date_for_pace: Set a due date to see pace
set_budget_for_pace: Set a budget to see pace
tax_regions_initialize_hint: Tax regions will be provisioned on the next sync.
no_tax_rates_yet_hint: Add tax rates on the legacy app or web client to populate this picker.
no_vendors_match_filters: No vendors match the current filters
vendor_not_found_subtitle: It may have been deleted or you may not have access.
create_your_first_vendor_placeholder: Create your first vendor to track suppliers and the expenses you log against them.
no_expenses_match_filters: No expenses match the current filters
create_your_first_expense_placeholder: Create your first expense to track money spent — link it to a vendor, client, or project, then invoice it back when it's billable.
no_recurring_expenses_match_filters: No recurring expenses match the current filters
create_your_first_recurring_expense_plac: Create a recurring expense for subscriptions, rent, or any cost that repeats on a schedule.
no_expense_categories_match_filters: No expense categories match the current filters
create_your_first_expense_category_place: Create a category to group related expenses — useful for reporting and tax classification.
no_invoices_match_filters: No invoices match the current filters
create_your_first_invoice_placeholder: Create your first invoice to bill a client — add line items, taxes, and a due date, then email it or download as PDF.
mark_paid_confirm: Mark this invoice as fully paid? The server will record a synthetic payment for the outstanding balance.
invoice_locked: This invoice is locked. Edits are disabled.
save_first_to_preview: Save the invoice first to see a PDF preview.
no_contacts: No contacts on this client yet
einvoice_help: PEPPOL fields edit the invoice's e_invoice envelope. Send via the Send to PEPPOL action once configured (Settings → E-Invoice).
no_quotes_match_filters: No quotes match the current filters
create_your_first_quote_placeholder: Create your first quote to send a client a price estimate — convert it to an invoice when accepted.
template_preview_placeholder: Edit the subject or body to see a preview
no_credits_match_filters: No credits match the current filters
create_your_first_credit_placeholder: Create your first credit to refund or offset a client invoice — apply it to outstanding invoices when ready.
no_schedules_hint: Schedules send statements, reports, and reminders on a recurring cadence — set one up below.
pause_schedule_hint: Paused schedules stay configured but skip every run until you resume.
starter_email_monthly_statements_hint: Send every client a statement on the 1st of each month.
starter_run_pnl_quarterly_hint: Email yourself a profit-and-loss report every three months.
pick_a_template_hint: Each template sends a different kind of email on the cadence you choose.
email_statement_hint: Email each client a statement of their open invoices.
email_record_hint: Email a specific invoice, quote, credit, or purchase order.
email_report_hint: Email a recurring report (P&L, sales by client, tasks, …).
invoice_outstanding_tasks_hint: Auto-invoice any tasks not yet billed.
payment_schedule_hint: Split a single invoice into scheduled installments.
no_payment_schedule_rows_hint: No installments yet — add a row below to split the invoice.
comma_separated_ids: Comma-separated ids; leave empty to include all.
no_purchase_orders_match_filters: No purchase orders match the current filters
create_your_first_purchase_order_placeho: Create your first purchase order to record what you're buying from a vendor — convert to an expense once received.
run_report_to_load_hint: Run to load :report for the selected date range. Pick a different report or date range above to change the query.
report_timed_out: Report timed out — try a narrower date range or fewer entities.
no_recurring_invoices_match_filters: No recurring invoices match the current filters
create_your_first_recurring_invoice_plac: Create your first recurring invoice template — the server will spawn invoices on the cadence you choose and (optionally) auto-bill them.
marked_recurring_invoice_as_sent: Successfully marked recurring invoice as sent
